item.title: Panasonic Recalls Electric Toaster Ovens Due to Shock and Fire Hazards
item.company: Panasonic Manufacturing (Xiamen) Co., Ltd, of Xiamen, Fujian, China
item.brand: Panasonic Manufacturing (Xiamen) Co., Ltd, of Xiamen, Fujian, China
item.summary: This recall involves all Panasonic Electric Toaster Ovens, Model No. NB-G200. The Electric Toaster Ovens are stainless steel with the temperature knob located on the bottom. The brand name Panasonic is written on the front of the product. The Electric Toaster has six cooking menus with pre-set buttons, with a digital timer (up to 25 minutes) and temperature settings (250-Degree F to 500-Degree F). The model number is located on the name plate label on the back of the Electric Toaster Oven.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Electric Toaster Ovens.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled Electric Toaster Oven immediately and contact Panasonic for a full refund.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
